overview.description: Data analytics and AI consulting agency helping Czech companies become data-driven
overview.description_long: Revolt BI is a consultancy-implementation agency founded in 2017 in Prague that specialises in data analytics, business intelligence, and AI solutions. With 50+ data experts and 100+ satisfied clients, they help companies across retail, e-commerce, logistics and manufacturing make better decisions through data. They offer services spanning data strategy, business dashboards, cloud migration, predictive analytics, AI strategy, rapid prototyping with AI, and a Data Academy training programme. Key technology partnerships include Snowflake, dbt, ThoughtSpot, Google Cloud, Tableau, and Power BI.
overview.tagline: Better data. Better decisions. Better results.

history.origin_story: Founded by Giuliano Giannetti in 2017 in Prague. First client was Košík.cz. Grew to ~50 data professionals and moved to new offices in the Docky complex.

key_milestones.event: Won Škoda Auto Hackathon (two years running), saving Škoda 60M CZK
Moved to Docky offices with nearly 50 data enthusiasts

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Revolt BI is a consulting/implementation agency whose core value lies in domain expertise and client relationships rather than proprietary AI. As LLM-powered BI tools (e.g. Tableau Pulse, ThoughtSpot AI) commoditise analytics implementation, their advisory and integration layer faces commoditisation pressure, though client trust and industry depth (retail, logistics) provide some buffer.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Data analytics consulting is a well-established, growing market in the Czech Republic and CEE. With 100+ paying clients including Škoda Auto, Mall.cz, and Sportisimo, Revolt BI has demonstrated clear product-market fit and recurring demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No visible external funding; the company appears to be bootstrapped with 50+ employees and a healthy client roster. Sustainable on client revenue but lacks the runway buffer of a VC-backed firm should market conditions shift.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A well-established, bootstrapped Czech data consultancy with a diversified client base and strong tech partnerships. Medium risk driven by consulting commoditisation pressure from AI tooling, partially offset by strong client relationships and domain expertise.

metadata.notes: Website is at revolt.bi (not revoltbi.com which is a parked domain). Company is Czech-language primary with an English version at revolt.bi/en/. Founder Giuliano Giannetti is mentioned by first name in origin story quote.
